final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a steampunk mechanical apparatus, featuring intricate gears, pipes, and gauges with Victorian-era decorative elements.

Style/medium: detailed editorial illustration, steampunk aesthetic in the tradition of Victorian industrial engravings, cross-hatching and fine linework with painterly rendering
Composition: centered mechanical assembly, slightly elevated three-quarter view to reveal depth and layering of components
Subject: complex interlocking brass and copper mechanical device — dense arrangement of gears of varying sizes, coiled pipes, pressure gauges with ornate bezels, riveted panels, and filigree Victorian decorative motifs
Scene/backdrop: neutral dark background to let the metallic surfaces read clearly
Lighting/mood: warm directional light from upper left, emphasizing the reflective sheen of brass and copper surfaces, precise and nostalgic industrial mood
Color palette: warm brass gold and oxidized copper as dominant tones, deep mahogany and aged iron as shadow anchors, faint verdigris patina as accent
Materials/textures: hammered brass plates with visible rivets, polished copper tubing with specular highlights, aged leather gaskets, glass gauge faces with fine engraved numerals
Avoid: modern plastic surfaces, neon or electric color accents, sci-fi chrome, flat cartoon rendering, generic clip-art gears
